label: Ritual pattern
description: Defines a ritual template used to generate Precept_Ritual instances. Specifies behavior, targeting, outcome effects, and display overrides for a ritual.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate a random name for the ritual when no label is specified.

ritualFreeStartIntervalDaysRange.label: Ritual free start interval days range
ritualFreeStartIntervalDaysRange.description: FloatRange controlling how many in-game days must pass between free (obligation-free) ritual starts.

ritualObligationTriggers.label: Ritual obligation triggers
ritualObligationTriggers.description: List of obligation trigger property objects. Each li selects a trigger class via the Class attribute.

ritualObligationTargetFilter.label: Ritual obligation target filter
ritualObligationTargetFilter.description: RitualObligationTargetFilterDef that selects valid targets for obligation-driven ritual starts.

ritualTargetFilter.label: Ritual target filter
ritualTargetFilter.description: RitualTargetFilterDef that selects valid targets for player-initiated ritual starts.

ritualBehavior.label: Ritual behavior
ritualBehavior.description: RitualBehaviorDef defining roles, stages, and overall behavior of the ritual.

ritualOutcomeEffect.label: Ritual outcome effect
ritualOutcomeEffect.description: RitualOutcomeEffectDef controlling outcome quality, chances, and comps for this ritual.

ritualOnlyForIdeoMembers.label: Ritual only for ideo members
ritualOnlyForIdeoMembers.description: If true, only members of the owning ideology may participate.

canStartAnytime.label: Can start anytime
canStartAnytime.description: If true, the player can start this ritual at any time as an anytime ritual.

alwaysStartAnytime.label: Always start anytime
alwaysStartAnytime.description: If true, the ritual is always marked as an anytime ritual regardless of other ideos.

allowOtherInstances.label: Allow other instances
allowOtherInstances.description: If true, multiple instances of this ritual pattern can be active simultaneously.

playsIdeoMusic.label: Plays ideo music
playsIdeoMusic.description: If true, ideo-specific music plays during this ritual.

ignoreConsumableBuildingRequirement.label: Ignore consumable building requirement
ignoreConsumableBuildingRequirement.description: If true, consumable building requirements are skipped when starting this ritual.

mergeGizmosForObligations.label: Merge gizmos for obligations
mergeGizmosForObligations.description: If true, obligation gizmos from this pattern are merged into one UI button.

canMergeGizmosFromDifferentIdeos.label: Can merge gizmos from different ideos
canMergeGizmosFromDifferentIdeos.description: If true, gizmos for this ritual can be merged with those from other ideologies.

ignoreExtremeTemperatures.label: Ignore extreme temperatures
ignoreExtremeTemperatures.description: If true, extreme temperature warnings are suppressed when starting this ritual.

minTechLevel.label: Min tech level
minTechLevel.description: Minimum faction tech level required to use this ritual pattern.

maxTechLevel.label: Max tech level
maxTechLevel.description: Maximum faction tech level permitted to use this ritual pattern. Undefined means no upper limit.

showIdeoIconsInDialog.label: Show ideo icons in dialog
showIdeoIconsInDialog.description: If true, ideology icons are shown in the ritual start dialog.

ritualExpectedDesc.label: Ritual expected desc
ritualExpectedDesc.description: Localized description of what the ritual is expected to produce, shown in the ritual info dialog.

ritualExpectedDescNoAdjective.label: Ritual expected desc (no adjective)
ritualExpectedDescNoAdjective.description: Variant of ritualExpectedDesc used when no quality adjective is prepended.

shortDescOverride.label: Short desc override
shortDescOverride.description: Overrides the short description shown in ritual selection UI.

descOverride.label: Desc override
descOverride.description: Overrides the full description of the generated ritual precept.

ritualExplanation.label: Ritual explanation
ritualExplanation.description: Additional explanation text shown in the ritual start dialog.

beginRitualOverride.label: Begin ritual override
beginRitualOverride.description: Override label for the start-ritual button in the gizmo or dialog.

iconPathOverride.label: Icon path override
iconPathOverride.description: Texture path for the ritual gizmo icon, relative to the game content folder.

cancelIconPathOverride.label: Cancel icon path override
cancelIconPathOverride.description: Texture path for the cancel-ritual gizmo icon.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: List of string tags used to group or filter ritual patterns.

patternGroupTag.label: Pattern group tag
patternGroupTag.description: Tag that groups multiple ritual patterns together in the ideology builder. Empty element is valid.

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this ritual pattern is only available on these PlanetLayerDefs.

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs on which this ritual pattern is not available.

new-ritual-pattern.label: New ritual pattern
new-ritual-pattern.description: Minimal ritual pattern with a behavior and icon path.
